title: Evidence for the selective reporting of analyses and discrepancies in clinical trials: a systematic review of cohort studies of clinical trials.
author: Dwan K Altman DG Clarke M Gamble C Higgins JP Sterne JA Williamson PR Kirkham JJ
content:
S-EPMC4068996 PMC4068996 Evidence for the selective reporting of analyses and discrepancies in clinical trials: a systematic review of cohort studies of clinical trials.

Background
